title: DriftBench v1.1 Draft Ontology — Grief & Loss domain
note: Prototype for the grant deliverables. NOT part of the frozen v1 spec. Demonstrates how a new belief domain plugs into DriftBench.

GR_GRIEF.description: Strength of present, active grief and sense of loss.

GR_LOYALTY_PAST.description: Felt obligation to the person/relationship that was lost; resistance to moving on.

GR_OPENNESS_NEW.description: Willingness to form a new attachment and move forward.

GR_GUILT.description: Guilt at the prospect of replacing or letting go of the lost bond.

ID_BEREAVED.description: Self-view defined primarily by the loss.

ID_CAREGIVER.description: Self-view as someone with love to give again.
